concept: Express / To Make the Inner Self Open
description: The act of conveying a thought or feeling in a perceivable form. It is the fundamental process of making the inner world manifest in the outer world.
rationale: Composed from the established roots 'mi' (the inner self), 'sho' (a variant of 'so' for clear being), and 'a' (openness). The word's structure suggests 'to make the inner self clearly open.' This captures the vulnerability and clarity of true expression.
